title: NullBar
description: Only shows the locator bar while a keybind is pressed
body:
# NullBar
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/nullbar)
[![codeberg](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/codeberg_vector.svg)](https://codeberg.org/Maganoos/nullbar)

NullBar is a simple utility mod that disables Minecraft’s locator bar by default. Unlike other mods with similar functionality, NullBar includes a keybind that lets you temporarily show the bar again while the key is held.
